news.title: Alkane Resources CEO On FY2026 Gold Performance
news.summary: Alkane Resources Ltd managing director and CEO Nic Earner talked with Proactive about the company’s FY2026 production performance after it ended the year in the top half of guidance. Alkane produced 42,491 gold-equivalent ounces in the June quarter and 168,337 gold-equivalent ounces for the full year, placing the company in the upper half of its 160,000 to 175,000-ounce production guidance range. Earner said the result reflected strong performance across the company’s three operating mines: Tomingley in New South Wales, Costerfield in Victoria and Björkdal in Sweden. Looking ahead, he said Alkane expected to provide further guidance in its upcoming quarterly report targeted for July 21. The discussion also covered exploration at the True Blue deposit, around two kilometres from Costerfield, where Alkane has reported encouraging results along a parallel strike structure. Earner said further exploration updates and reserve and resource updates were expected over the coming months. Visit Proactive’s YouTube channel for more videos, and don’t forget to give the video a like, subscribe to the channel and enable notifications for future content.

news.title: Inside the ICE House x Las Vegas: MindWave Innovations CEO Dr. Vin Menon
news.summary: From Lake Las Vegas, Nevada, Dr. Vin Menon, CEO of MindWave Innovations, goes Inside the ICE House to discuss the growing adoption of digital asset treasury strategies by public companies. He explains how MindWave helps institutions establish Bitcoin-focused treasuries, generate yield, and navigate security and governance requirements. Menon also highlights the company’s merger with Apimeds Pharmaceuticals as a model for integrating digital assets into corporate balance sheets. He outlines how blockchain infrastructure and AI may converge to improve security, privacy, and operational efficiency across industries.
